warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Accusative case endings for articles and possessives with feminine and masculine nouns — specifically practicing 'meine Frau' (nominative) vs. 'für meine Frau' (accusative/dative) and 'einen / ein' in ordering contexts.
speaking_prompt: You're standing in front of a famous painting at the Kunsthistorisches Museum. Dr. Huber approaches and offers to tell you about it. Ask follow-up questions — who painted it, when, and what it means.
